questionText: Durante uma apresentação em classe, você quer pedir ao professor para esclarecer um conceito que não ficou claro. Como você poderia fazer isso de forma educada e profissional?
correctAnswer: Could you perhaps elaborate on that concept? I found it rather obscure.
options: Could you perhaps elaborate on that concept? I found it rather obscure.
I didn't get what you said. Explain it again.
That was confusing. Say it differently.
I don't understand nothing you said.

questionText: Um colega pede sua ajuda para compreender um tópico difícil. Qual expressão demonstra sua disponibilidade para ajudar?
correctAnswer: I'd be delighted to walk you through it step by step.
options: I'd be delighted to walk you through it step by step.
OK, I help you with this.
Yeah, I can help you maybe.
If I got time, I explain it to you.

questionText: Ao enviar um email ao seu professor questionando uma nota recebida, qual tom seria mais apropriado?
correctAnswer: I would appreciate your perspective on the feedback provided for my assignment. Could we discuss the evaluation criteria?
options: I would appreciate your perspective on the feedback provided for my assignment. Could we discuss the evaluation criteria?
Why did you give me this bad grade? It's not fair.
I'm not happy with my mark. Change it please.
Your marking is wrong. I deserve a better grade.

questionText: Você quer expressar discordância respeitosa com a opinião de um professor durante uma aula de discussão. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: While I understand your viewpoint, I'd like to offer an alternative perspective on this matter.
options: While I understand your viewpoint, I'd like to offer an alternative perspective on this matter.
You're wrong about that, professor.
I don't agree with what you said.
That's not right at all, teacher.

questionText: Em um seminário acadêmico, você precisa interromper elegantemente alguém para fazer uma pergunta relevante. Qual seria a melhor abordagem?
correctAnswer: If I may interject for a moment, I have a question that seems pertinent to your argument.
options: If I may interject for a moment, I have a question that seems pertinent to your argument.
Wait, I got a question for you.
Stop. I wanna ask something.
Hey, let me say something here.

questionText: Um aluno quer pedir extensão de prazo para entregar um trabalho acadêmico. Como faria isso formalmente?
correctAnswer: I was wondering if it might be possible to request an extension given unforeseen circumstances.
options: I was wondering if it might be possible to request an extension given unforeseen circumstances.
Can I have more time? I'm not done yet.
I need more days to do my homework.
Give me extra time, please, I'm busy.

questionText: Ao apresentar suas ideias em um debate acadêmico, qual frase melhor estrutura um argumento sólido?
correctAnswer: This contention is substantiated by compelling evidence that demonstrates...
options: This contention is substantiated by compelling evidence that demonstrates...
My idea is good because I think it's right.
I believe this is true and stuff.
The thing is, I'm pretty sure about this.

questionText: Você quer expressar que precisa de mais tempo para processar informações complexas fornecidas pelo professor. Como diria isso?
correctAnswer: I need some time to absorb and synthesize the material you've presented.
options: I need some time to absorb and synthesize the material you've presented.
This is too much. I don't understand.
Give me time, OK? It's difficult.
I need more time to get this.

questionText: Durante uma orientação acadêmica, como você pediria feedback específico sobre seu desempenho?
correctAnswer: Could you furnish more detailed feedback regarding the particular areas where my performance fell short?
options: Could you furnish more detailed feedback regarding the particular areas where my performance fell short?
Tell me what I did wrong.
What did I do bad in my work?
I'm not good at this. Help me, please.

questionText: Um professor faz uma pergunta e você está bem preparado para responder com confiança. Como responderia?
correctAnswer: Based on my research and analysis, I would argue that the evidence predominantly supports...
options: Based on my research and analysis, I would argue that the evidence predominantly supports...
I know this one. The answer is...
Yeah, I studied this. It's like...
I'm pretty sure the answer is this thing.

questionText: Em um trabalho em grupo, você discorda da abordagem de um colega. Como expressaria sua preocupação de forma construtiva?
correctAnswer: I appreciate your proposed methodology, but I'd like to propose a more efficacious approach.
options: I appreciate your proposed methodology, but I'd like to propose a more efficacious approach.
Your way is wrong. Do it my way.
That's not a good idea. Mine is better.
I don't like your plan. Let's do something else.

questionText: Você quer reconhecer a dificuldade de um conceito sem parecer incompetente. Como expressaria isso?
correctAnswer: While admittedly challenging, I'm committed to grappling with the complexities of this subject matter.
options: While admittedly challenging, I'm committed to grappling with the complexities of this subject matter.
This is so hard. I don't get it.
This is too difficult for me to understand.
I'm stupid. I don't know this stuff.

questionText: Em um seminário, você quer conectar as ideias do palestrante a conceitos previamente estudados. Como faria isso?
correctAnswer: This dovetails remarkably well with the paradigm we examined in our previous module.
options: This dovetails remarkably well with the paradigm we examined in our previous module.
This is like what we studied before.
Yeah, it's the same thing as before kind of.
It's related to what we learned earlier.

questionText: Você quer expressar que necessita de orientação mais aprofundada em uma área específica. Como comunicaria isso?
correctAnswer: I would greatly benefit from more comprehensive guidance in this particular domain.
options: I would greatly benefit from more comprehensive guidance in this particular domain.
I need help with this part.
Can you teach me more about this?
I don't know this topic very well.

questionText: Durante uma discussão acadêmica, como você reformularia diplomaticamente um ponto que um colega expressou inadequadamente?
correctAnswer: What I believe you're attempting to articulate is that the variables in question demonstrate a correlative relationship.
options: What I believe you're attempting to articulate is that the variables in question demonstrate a correlative relationship.
You said that wrong. Here's what you meant.
That doesn't make sense. You meant this.
You explained that badly. Let me say it right.

questionText: Você precisa pedir permissão ao professor para deixar a sala durante a aula por motivos legítimos. Como o faria?
correctAnswer: Might I be excused for a moment? I have an urgent matter requiring my immediate attention.
options: Might I be excused for a moment? I have an urgent matter requiring my immediate attention.
Can I go? I gotta do something.
I need to leave. Be back soon.
Is it OK if I leave for a bit?

questionText: Em uma entrevista para bolsa de estudos, como você expressaria suas motivações acadêmicas de forma convincente?
correctAnswer: My scholarly aspirations are driven by an unwavering commitment to advancing knowledge in this field.
options: My scholarly aspirations are driven by an unwavering commitment to advancing knowledge in this field.
I wanna study this because it's cool.
I like learning about this stuff.
I think this subject is interesting and important.

questionText: Ao refutar um argumento acadêmico apresentado por um colega, qual abordagem seria mais sofisticada e respeitosa?
correctAnswer: While your premise is noteworthy, the empirical data appears to undermine your central thesis considerably.
options: While your premise is noteworthy, the empirical data appears to undermine your central thesis considerably.
You're totally wrong about that.
That doesn't work because you're wrong.
I disagree. Your idea is bad.

questionText: Um professor solicita que você justifique suas escolhas metodológicas em um projeto de pesquisa. Como responderia de forma erudita?
correctAnswer: The methodological framework I've adopted affords the most robust analytical lens for interrogating the research questions at hand.
options: The methodological framework I've adopted affords the most robust analytical lens for interrogating the research questions at hand.
I chose this way because it works better.
I think this method is the best one to use.
This approach seemed like the right choice.

questionText: Você quer expressar apoio a uma ideia inovadora de um colega enquanto mantém pensamento crítico. Como faria?
correctAnswer: Your proposition is intriguing, though I would posit that further empirical validation would strengthen its credibility.
options: Your proposition is intriguing, though I would posit that further empirical validation would strengthen its credibility.
That's a good idea. I think it's correct.
Yeah, that sounds right to me.
I like your idea. It's probably true.

questionText: Durante uma aula, você quer apontar uma inconsistência lógica no argumento do professor sem parecer pretensioso. Como procederia?
correctAnswer: I'm perhaps misunderstanding, but doesn't this premise seem somewhat incongruent with the subsequent assertion?
options: I'm perhaps misunderstanding, but doesn't this premise seem somewhat incongruent with the subsequent assertion?
That doesn't make sense, professor.
You're contradicting yourself there.
That's not logical. It doesn't fit together.

questionText: Você precisa solicitar uma carta de recomendação a um professor que o conhece bem. Como faria esse pedido formal?
correctAnswer: I would be most grateful if you would consider writing a letter of recommendation attesting to my academic capabilities.
options: I would be most grateful if you would consider writing a letter of recommendation attesting to my academic capabilities.
Can you write me a recommendation letter?
Will you write a letter saying I'm good?
I need a recommendation. Can you write it?

questionText: Em uma conferência acadêmica, como você faria uma pergunta sofisticada para aprofundar o entendimento sobre um tema?
correctAnswer: To what extent might the variables you've identified be subject to confounding factors that could potentially vitiate your conclusions?
options: To what extent might the variables you've identified be subject to confounding factors that could potentially vitiate your conclusions?
What about the other things that might affect your answer?
Did you think about other stuff that could change this?
Are there other factors you didn't think about?

questionText: Você quer reconhecer a expertise de um colega enquanto contribui com uma perspectiva diferente. Como expressaria isso?
correctAnswer: Your expertise is indisputable; nevertheless, I would venture to suggest an alternative angle that merits consideration.
options: Your expertise is indisputable; nevertheless, I would venture to suggest an alternative angle that merits consideration.
You know a lot, but I think different.
You're smart, but I see it differently.
You're the expert, but maybe try this way.

questionText: Em um trabalho em grupo, você precisa supervisionar o progresso sem alienar seus colegas. Como comunicaria suas preocupações?
correctAnswer: I wonder if we might reconvene to assess our trajectory and ensure we're meeting our stipulated benchmarks.
options: I wonder if we might reconvene to assess our trajectory and ensure we're meeting our stipulated benchmarks.
We need to check what we're doing. Are we on track?
Let's see how we're going with this project.
We should probably meet up to see if we're doing OK.

questionText: Você quer pedir desculpas por não ter completado uma tarefa acadêmica e explicar a situação responsavelmente. Como faria?
correctAnswer: I must apologize for the oversight; unforeseen circumstances notwithstanding, I take full responsibility for my failure to meet the deadline.
options: I must apologize for the oversight; unforeseen circumstances notwithstanding, I take full responsibility for my failure to meet the deadline.
Sorry, I didn't do it. Stuff came up.
I'm sorry I didn't finish. I was busy.
My bad. I couldn't get it done in time.

questionText: Durante uma revisão de literatura para sua dissertação, como você expressaria que precisa de orientação sobre fontes primárias?
correctAnswer: I would appreciate your guidance in discerning which primary sources would constitute the most authoritative and relevant evidence for my investigation.
options: I would appreciate your guidance in discerning which primary sources would constitute the most authoritative and relevant evidence for my investigation.
Which sources should I use for my paper?
What are the best books to read for this?
Can you tell me what to use for my research?

questionText: Um colega propõe uma estratégia para um projeto que você acha arriscada. Como expressaria sua preocupação diplomaticamente?
correctAnswer: While I commend your boldness, I harbor reservations regarding the viability of this approach given the inherent constraints.
options: While I commend your boldness, I harbor reservations regarding the viability of this approach given the inherent constraints.
That won't work. It's too risky.
I don't think that will work because it's risky.
That's a bad idea. We shouldn't do it.

questionText: Você quer solicitar que um professor revise seu trabalho anterior antes de submeter a versão final. Como faria essa solicitação?
correctAnswer: I would be most appreciative if you could peruse my draft and furnish preliminary feedback prior to final submission.
options: I would be most appreciative if you could peruse my draft and furnish preliminary feedback prior to final submission.
Can you read my paper and tell me if it's good?
Will you look at my draft and give feedback?
Can you check my work before I turn it in?

questionText: Em uma palestra, você quer fazer uma observação que complementa o argumento principal. Como o faria?
correctAnswer: As a corollary to your assertion, one might adduce that this phenomenon corroborates the broader theoretical framework.
options: As a corollary to your assertion, one might adduce that this phenomenon corroborates the broader theoretical framework.
That's like what you said before kind of.
Yeah, that goes with what you're saying.
This is also related to your main point.

questionText: Você precisa argumentar por uma mudança de paradigma em um campo académico durante uma apresentação formal. Como estruturaria isso?
correctAnswer: The preponderance of recent scholarship necessitates a fundamental reconceptualization of our theoretical underpinnings in this discipline.
options: The preponderance of recent scholarship necessitates a fundamental reconceptualization of our theoretical underpinnings in this discipline.
I think we need to change how we look at this stuff.
People are saying we should think about this differently.
Maybe it's time to change our ideas about this topic.

questionText: Durante um seminário de tese, como você responderia a críticas substanciais de forma erudita e sem ser defensivo?
correctAnswer: Your critique is perspicacious; I shall endeavor to incorporate these insights to fortify the intellectual rigor of my dissertation.
options: Your critique is perspicacious; I shall endeavor to incorporate these insights to fortify the intellectual rigor of my dissertation.
OK, I'll try to fix those things you said.
Yeah, I'll change my paper based on your comments.
Thanks for pointing that out. I'll improve it.

questionText: Você quer propor uma colaboração interdisciplinar com pesquisadores de outro departamento. Como faria essa abordagem?
correctAnswer: I would propose a synergistic collaboration that capitalizes on the complementary expertise of our respective disciplines.
options: I would propose a synergistic collaboration that capitalizes on the complementary expertise of our respective disciplines.
Do you wanna work together on a project?
Maybe we could team up and do research.
Could we collaborate on something together?

questionText: Em um congresso acadêmico, como você desafiaria elegantemente uma premissa aceita sem parecer arrogante?
correctAnswer: While consensus exists regarding this proposition, I would venture to interrogate its foundational assumptions.
options: While consensus exists regarding this proposition, I would venture to interrogate its foundational assumptions.
Everyone says this is true, but I don't think so.
People believe this, but I think they're wrong.
This is what everyone believes, but maybe it's not right.

questionText: Você quer articular uma lacuna significativa na literatura acadêmica de forma persuasiva. Como procederia?
correctAnswer: Extant scholarship exhibits a conspicuous lacuna regarding the intersection of these phenomena, thus necessitating further empirical investigation.
options: Extant scholarship exhibits a conspicuous lacuna regarding the intersection of these phenomena, thus necessitating further empirical investigation.
There's not much written about this combination of things.
Nobody has really studied how these things work together.
The research doesn't really cover this area well enough.

questionText: Durante uma defesa de tese, como você responderia a uma pergunta desafiadora que expõe uma fraqueza em sua pesquisa?
correctAnswer: That constitutes a salutary point; while my methodology did impose certain constraints, I maintain that the findings retain considerable validity.
options: That constitutes a salutary point; while my methodology did impose certain constraints, I maintain that the findings retain considerable validity.
Yeah, that's a problem, but I still think my research is good.
That's true, but my study still works even with that issue.
You're right about that, but my conclusions are still valid.

questionText: Você quer demonstrar familiaridade com perspectivas contraditórias em sua área enquanto mantém sua posição intelectual. Como faria?
correctAnswer: The antagonistic schools of thought, while substantively divergent, both contribute valuable frameworks that I shall synthesize in my analysis.
options: The antagonistic schools of thought, while substantively divergent, both contribute valuable frameworks that I shall synthesize in my analysis.
These two ways of thinking are different, but both are kind of right.
Both sides have good points, and I'll use them both.
These opposing ideas both have something good to offer.

questionText: Em um painel acadêmico internacional, como você relacionaria seu trabalho ao contexto global de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: My research endeavors to elucidate how these localized phenomena instantiate broader patterns of transnational significance.
options: My research endeavors to elucidate how these localized phenomena instantiate broader patterns of transnational significance.
My study is about local stuff that happens everywhere.
This shows how small things connect to big international patterns.
My research relates local issues to global problems.

questionText: Você quer solicitar acesso a dados ou recursos acadêmicos restritos de forma profissional. Como abordaria o responsável?
correctAnswer: Would you countenance granting provisional access to the aforementioned dataset, contingent upon adherence to the requisite protocols?
options: Would you countenance granting provisional access to the aforementioned dataset, contingent upon adherence to the requisite protocols?
Can I use your data? I promise to be careful.
Could you let me use these numbers for my project?
Is it OK if I look at your research data?

questionText: Durante uma sessão de orientação de pesquisa, como você buscaria validação de sua escolha teórica sem parecer inseguro?
correctAnswer: I would be remiss not to solicit your perspective on whether this theoretical apparatus adequately addresses the research questions I've delineated.
options: I would be remiss not to solicit your perspective on whether this theoretical apparatus adequately addresses the research questions I've delineated.
Does my theory work for my questions? I'm not sure.
I picked this theory, but is it the right one?
Do you think this approach is good for what I'm studying?

questionText: Você quer articular uma transição conceitual em sua dissertação de forma elegante. Como o faria?
correctAnswer: Having established the aforementioned parameters, we shall now pivot to an examination of how these variables manifest in the empirical domain.
options: Having established the aforementioned parameters, we shall now pivot to an examination of how these variables manifest in the empirical domain.
Now let's look at how this works in real life.
So we've covered that, now let's look at examples.
OK, so we've explained that. Now let's see it in practice.

questionText: Em uma conferência, como você expressaria que um trabalho anterior precisa de reinterpretação à luz de novas evidências?
correctAnswer: Contemporary scholarship compels us to reconsider extant interpretations in light of these heretofore unavailable evidentiary materials.
options: Contemporary scholarship compels us to reconsider extant interpretations in light of these heretofore unavailable evidentiary materials.
We need to rethink old ideas because we found new evidence.
The older research needs to be reinterpreted with the new evidence.
We have new information that changes what people thought before.

questionText: Você quer reconhecer o trabalho de um mentor enquanto afirma sua própria contribuição intelectual independente. Como faria?
correctAnswer: While my intellectual trajectory owes considerable debt to my mentor's tutelage, I have endeavored to chart a somewhat divergent analytical path.
options: While my intellectual trajectory owes considerable debt to my mentor's tutelage, I have endeavored to chart a somewhat divergent analytical path.
My teacher helped me a lot, but I have my own ideas too.
I learned from my mentor, but I think differently now.
My advisor influenced me, but I've developed my own approach.

questionText: Durante uma avaliação de pares, como você forneceria crítica construtiva sobre um trabalho com sérias deficiências metodológicas?
correctAnswer: While the research question is compelling, the methodological framework exhibits notable deficiencies that substantially undermine the validity of the conclusions.
options: While the research question is compelling, the methodological framework exhibits notable deficiencies that substantially undermine the validity of the conclusions.
This paper has a good question but the method is bad.
The idea is good, but the way you did it is wrong.
The research question is interesting, but your method doesn't work.
